title: Obscure Masks
description: Adds masks to the game with their own special abilities
body:
Unleash the power of **obscure masks** in Minecraft with this [Modfest:Carnival](https://modfest.net/carnival) entry! Inspired by The Legend of Zelda, this mod introduces a collection of unique masks, some granting special abilities!

## Masks

### Villager Mask
Imitate the annoying sounds of villagers!
### Bomb Mask
Press **Shift** to unleash an explosion!
### Frog Mask
Attract frogs as you're able to jump twice as high and resist more fall damage!
### Fish Mask
In progress...
### Plumber Mask
WAHOOO!!! Also in progress...

_More features will be added in future versions!_


## Credits
- [lumiscosity](https://modrinth.com/user/lumiscosity) for frog mask textures and concept

# Requirements
- [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)
- [Cardinal Components API](https://modrinth.com/mod/cardinal-components-api)
